_comment: compute-state-routing-parity.json — declared allowlist of coupled compute_state routing branches,
consumed by lazy_parity_audit.py::audit_compute_state_routing_parity (a sibling of
audit_state_script_parity). It closes the gap that let an UNMIRRORED compute_state routing fix
(Round 92 research-pending exclusion; Round 93 verification-only bypass conjunct) pass the parity
audit clean and stall a live run weeks later — the audit historically covered only NAMED CLI/
call-site literals, never the highest-churn coupled surface: compute_state's routing branches.
SCHEMA (each entry of `branches`):
id              — stable kebab-case identifier for the routing branch.
signature       — a STRUCTURAL token (verbatim substring) the branch is recognized by inside a
script's compute_state region. Written in CANONICAL (feature / lazy-state.py)
vocab; the audit derives the bug-state.py form via apply_tokens (see below).
classification  — 'mirrored'            : signature MUST appear in BOTH scripts' compute_state.
'tabulated-divergence' : signature appears in ONE script only (a justified,
reviewable, feature/bug-shaped divergence).
token_substitutions (optional) — list of {canonical, derived} pairs fed to lazy_parity_audit.
apply_tokens so a mirrored branch whose two scripts legitimately differ on
--feature-id/--bug-id-class vocab (e.g. __mark_complete__ vs __mark_fixed__)
still matches in bug-state.py. Omit when the signature is vocab-neutral.
owner           — (tabulated-divergence ONLY) the state script that carries the branch
('lazy-state.py' or 'bug-state.py'). The audit asserts the signature is present
in the OWNER's compute_state; it does NOT require absence in the other.
reason          — (tabulated-divergence ONLY, REQUIRED) why the divergence is correct.
The census is DIVERGENCE-AWARE BY CONSTRUCTION — exactly like the SKILL-pair manifest
(lazy-parity-manifest.json) tabulates its divergences. To add a NEW justified compute_state
divergence, add a 'tabulated-divergence' row with an owner + a reason; the audit then tolerates it.
The allowlist need not enumerate every line of compute_state — it covers the shared routing
branches whose asymmetry would stall a live run (the two field recurrences + the shared skip
family). The host-capability FAIL-FAST is additionally covered whole-file by
audit_state_script_parity surface #5; the routing-branch row here is compute_state-scoped
defense-in-depth beside its (feature-only) miss-defer divergence.

branches.signature: workstation_bypass = not cloud and not plans and verification_only
branches.note: Round 93 recurrence: the Step-7 verification-only bypass conjunct. bug-state.py once kept an over-narrow combined form (requiring _has_any_complete_plan) that the feature side had dropped, producing an infinite write-plan loop the audit never flagged. Must stay identical on both scripts.

branches.signature: cloud_bypass = cloud and not plans and _has_any_complete_plan(
branches.note: The cloud half of the same Step-7 bypass gate (cloud can't tick any workstation row, so it needs the explicit Complete-plan receipt). Coupled to the workstation conjunct above.
queue-dependency-dag D2/D3: the compute_state walk-loop dep-gate holds an item whose dep is not receipt-gated-complete. Enforced on BOTH pipelines.
queue-dependency-dag D4: a dangling / Superseded / Won't-fix dep fails fast with a canonical BLOCKED.md (blocker_kind: unknown-dependency) on both pipelines.
The real-device axis defer/re-open. bug-state.py carries the single device axis in v1, so this routing surface is mirrored.

host-capability-declaration-for-gated-features: an unregistered requires_host: id fails fast on BOTH scripts (a silent defer would starve the item forever). Also asserted whole-file by audit_state_script_parity surface #5 — this row is the compute_state-scoped restatement beside the miss-defer divergence.

The forward-advancing completion terminal. Feature pipeline routes to __mark_complete__; the bug pipeline's byte-mirror routes to __mark_fixed__ (apply_tokens substitution). Exercises the --feature-id/--bug-id-class vocab bridge.

branches.reason: Round 92 recurrence. The research-pending gate (RESEARCH_PROMPT.md / NEEDS_RESEARCH.md exclusion, --skip-needs-research) is a FEATURE-pipeline mechanic: the bug pipeline has NO research step (bugs are investigated directly via /spec-bug, which produces PHASES.md). bug-state.py accepts strict_research_halt as a parity-ONLY argparse param but has no research routing branch — a correct feature-only divergence, not a mirror-owed gap.

host-capability-declaration-for-gated-features: the capability-MISS DEFER (DEFERRED_REQUIRES_HOST.md skip + the host-capability-saturated terminal) is feature-pipeline-shaped queue-selection curation. bug-state.py deliberately does not expose the N-capability miss-defer (it has only the single device axis in v1); only the host-capability FAIL-FAST above is mirrored.
